sources.name: Walt Disney World Special Offers
sources.notes: Official Disney offers page. Best source for resort, ticket, and dining promotions.

sources.name: Walt Disney World Tickets
sources.notes: Official Disney ticket page. Useful for baseline ticket pricing.

sources.name: Undercover Tourist Disney World Tickets
sources.notes: Common third-party ticket source. Verify final price manually before buying.

sources.name: Google Flights DFW to Orlando
sources.notes: Flight APIs usually require paid access. This bot stores the review link and can later connect to a flight API.

sources.name: Southwest Low Fare Calendar
sources.notes: Southwest fares often require manual review or a compliant provider API.
